data_coverage_summary: Samsara Driver Documents covers document templates, document retrieval, PDF generation, webhook-based submission handling, and API-based document creation or prefill flows for driver workflows and proof-of-work capture.
buyer_guidance: Use Driver Documents when Last Mile needs proof-of-delivery, stop-task, inspection, or workflow capture inside the Samsara Driver App. This is a workflow/document surface rather than an asset or telemetry API, but it does support concrete writeback for required or submitted documents.
overview: The Documents guides document both read and write flows. The base Documents guide covers `GET /v1/fleet/drivers/document_types` plus document retrieval endpoints for document instances, while the Creating Documents guide documents `POST /fleet/documents` for creating required documents for drivers or submitting documents on a driver's behalf. The schema-level field documentation also makes clear which field types can be populated by API and which must be left for the driver to complete in-app.

available_data.description: Template discovery and document retrieval provide the structure and current contents of driver workflow artifacts.
data_points: document state, timestamps, and associated driver/vehicle context

available_data.description: The create-document flow supports both prefill and admin-side submission patterns.
data_points: required documents for drivers to complete in the app
submitted documents created on behalf of a driver
prefilled string, number, multiple-choice, and datetime values

available_data.description: The guide documents which payload elements are API-populatable and which remain app-driven.
data_points: signature metadata and signature-image URLs on retrieved documents
photo and signature submission constraints for API-created documents

ingest_considerations: Photo and signature fields cannot be submitted via API, so writeback coverage is partial even though document creation itself is supported.
Document types should be read first so field order and allowed value types are known before creating or prefilling documents.
This product is workflow-centric and should not be interpreted as telemetry coverage just because documents may include timestamps or vehicle references.
Webhooks and PDFs are useful complements if downstream systems need event-driven completion handling or archival artifacts.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Backed by the Documents guide for GET /v1/fleet/drivers/document_types and document retrieval endpoints, plus the Creating Documents guide for POST /fleet/documents and the documented API limitations around photo and signature fields.
